description: Render a side-by-side comparison MP4 from a locally-staged VDA run: original input video left, augmented output right (read-only inputs).
rules: writes the hstack compare MP4 under <RUN_LOCAL_DIR>/display/; the porter mirrors the render summary to record_store
operates only on already-staged local artifacts — does not download from OSMO
AUG_INDEX selects which augmentation index to compare (default 0)
usage: Stage a run first (e.g. with stage_run_artifacts), then set RUN_LOCAL_DIR (staged run dir), DATASET, and VIDEO (video stem). Optional env: AUG_INDEX (default 0). Output: compare.txt.
limitation: Requires ffmpeg and a fully-staged local run dir with both the input and augmented mp4 present; without them the porter degrades gracefully and records the failure. Rendering only — does not run augmentation, auto-labeling, or any OSMO download.
